failedAssertions.reason: `spikes login` can store token via `--token`, but `spikes whoami` does not work immediately after login (JSON parse error from /me response).
`spikes whoami` fails with JSON parse error instead of displaying email and tier.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `POST /auth/rotate-token` endpoint is not implemented (404 Not Found).
`POST /auth/recover` endpoint is not implemented (404 Not Found).

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator guidance sections for Identity Auth API and CLI Auth Commands, including isolation and evidence requirements.
